title: galium demissum subsp. demissum
intro: Galium demissum subsp. demissum, also known as alpine bedstraw, is a plant species within the family Rubiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and potentially aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Galium demissum subsp. demissum can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
